vehicles.name: eTerron 9
vehicles.shortDesc: Nepal's first luxury electric 4WD pickup with adjustable air suspension and dual-motor performance.
vehicles.description: The eTerron 9 redefines what an electric pickup can do. With its powerful dual-motor 4WD system, you get instant torque and unparalleled control on any terrain. The advanced All-Terrain System (ATS) offers 400+ customizable mode combinations, letting you tailor the driving experience to your exact needs. Whether you're navigating city streets or exploring mountain trails, the eTerron 9 delivers uncompromising capability with zero emissions.
features: Air independent suspension & Multi-link Rear Axle
Power adjustment for front row seats

technology.title: Dual Motor 4WD
technology.desc: Powerful dual-motor system delivers instant torque and exceptional all-terrain capability. Independent front and rear motors provide precise torque vectoring for superior handling.

technology.title: All-Terrain System (ATS)
technology.desc: 400+ customizable mode combinations to conquer any terrain with confidence. Includes Snow, Mud, Sand, Rock, and Eco modes with adjustable suspension height.

technology.title: Smart Regeneration
technology.desc: Adjustable regenerative braking with paddle shifters for maximum efficiency. Choose from 3 levels of regeneration to suit your driving style and road conditions.

technology.title: V2L Technology
technology.desc: Vehicle-to-load capability allows you to power external devices and appliances. Perfect for camping trips or worksite power needs.

technology.title: Intelligent Thermal Management
technology.desc: Advanced battery thermal management system ensures optimal performance in all weather conditions, with pre-conditioning for maximum efficiency.

technology.title: OTA Updates
technology.desc: Over-the-air software updates keep your vehicle's systems current with the latest features and improvements.

gallery.title: Front Profile
gallery.description: Aggressive front fascia with LED matrix headlights

gallery.title: Arctic White
gallery.description: Crisp and clean pearl white finish

gallery.title: Lighting Signature
gallery.description: Full LED lighting with daytime running signature

gallery.title: Cargo Space
gallery.description: Versatile bed with multiple tie-down points

vehicles.name: MIFA 9
vehicles.shortDesc: The world's first full-size pure electric MPV, featuring aviation-grade seating and 5-star safety.
vehicles.description: The MIFA 9 redefines executive travel with its aviation-grade seating and ultra-quiet cabin. Experience first-class comfort with massage functions, premium sound insulation, and a panoramic glass roof that brings the outside in. Designed for those who demand the best in luxury and sustainability, the MIFA 9 sets a new standard for electric mobility.
features: Aviation-grade executive seats with massage function
Panoramic glass roof with power sunshade
Premium sound system with active noise cancellation
Power sliding doors with foot sensor activation

technology.title: Executive Lounge
technology.desc: First-class seating with heating, ventilation, and massage functions for ultimate comfort. Second-row seats feature power adjustment, memory settings, and a dedicated entertainment system.

technology.title: Smart Cabin
technology.desc: Voice-controlled ambient lighting and entertainment system for personalized experiences. AI assistant responds to natural commands for climate, navigation, and media control.

technology.title: Ultra-Silent Drive
technology.desc: Advanced sound insulation technology with acoustic glass and active noise cancellation for whisper-quiet cabin serenity. Enjoy conversation-quality interior at highway speeds.

technology.title: Intelligent Safety Suite
technology.desc: Comprehensive ADAS package includes adaptive cruise control, lane keeping assist, automatic emergency braking, and blind spot monitoring for maximum safety.

technology.title: Smart Parking
technology.desc: Fully automated parking system with 360° camera and ultrasonic sensors handles parallel and perpendicular parking with a single touch.

technology.title: Connected Car
technology.desc: Remote vehicle control via smartphone app. Check battery status, pre-condition cabin temperature, and locate your vehicle from anywhere.

gallery.title: Front View
gallery.description: Commanding front grille with signature lighting

vehicles.name: MIFA 7
vehicles.shortDesc: Designed for modern families, combining exceptional range with versatile space and smart technology.
vehicles.description: The MIFA 7 is the perfect companion for modern families. With its industry-leading 635km range, flexible seating configurations, and family-friendly technology, every journey becomes an adventure. Smart storage solutions and intuitive controls make daily driving effortless. From school runs to weekend getaways, the MIFA 7 adapts to your family's needs.
features: Flexible seating configuration for maximum cargo
Multiple USB-C ports for all rows
Wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto

technology.title: Long Range
technology.desc: Industry-leading 635km range for worry-free travel across Nepal. Advanced battery technology ensures consistent performance in varying weather conditions.

technology.title: Smart Space
technology.desc: Modular seating system adapts from passenger to cargo mode in seconds. Fold-flat second and third-row seats create up to 1200L of cargo space.

technology.title: Family Connect
technology.desc: Integrated child monitoring and entertainment system for peace of mind. Rear-seat camera allows front occupants to check on passengers without turning around.

technology.title: Efficient Powertrain
technology.desc: Optimized electric motor and battery system delivers class-leading efficiency. Regenerative braking captures energy during deceleration to extend range.

technology.title: Smart Climate
technology.desc: Intelligent climate control system with rear-seat vents and individual temperature zones ensures comfort for all passengers.

technology.title: Safety Suite
technology.desc: Comprehensive safety features include multiple airbags, electronic stability control, hill start assist, and ISOFIX child seat anchors.

gallery.title: Rear View
gallery.description: Clean lines with full LED taillights
